gist.headline: Surfing the retro web 🏄
gist.blurb: Dust off your dial-up modem! GeoCitAIes is now live in the Creative showcase, letting you generate beautifully chaotic 1990s-style personal homepages on demand.
gist.summary: Added GeoCitAIes.com to the community showcase, a new app that generates retro 1990s-style personal homepages using AI personas.
gist.impact: Users can now explore and generate nostalgic, 90s-themed web pages powered by pollinations.ai.
gist.visual_concept: A nostalgic 1990s internet theme. The Monitor Robot displaying a retro webpage with classic 90s elements, while Polly the bee wears 90s pixel shades and types on a chunky retro keyboard.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing retro 90s pixel sunglasses, typing on a chunky beige keyboard next to a cute robot with a CRT monitor head. The robot's screen glows with a nostalgic 1990s-style webpage. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel peach gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
